second.title: Click 'Select Item' to customize your meal
second.desc: Choose from the menu and personalize your meal according to your preferences and dietary needs.

error.invalid-password: Invalid password. Password should have minimum 8 letters, included uppercase*1, lowercase*1, number*1, symbol*1

About.title: About Us
About.intro: Welcome to The Cafe, your ultimate relaxation destination in the heart of the city. Our charming tea and coffee shop offers a tranquil haven where you can unwind and savor exceptional beverages. Whether you’re seeking the perfect espresso or a soothing herbal tea, our carefully curated menu has something for everyone. With a cozy, inviting atmosphere, comfortable seating, free Wi-Fi, and delicious pastries, The Cafe is ideal for catching up with friends, reading a book, or enjoying a peaceful moment alone. Experience the serenity and excellent drinks that await you at The Cafe.
About.address: Address: 10th Floor, No. 100, Zhongxiao East Road, Section 4, Da’an District, Taipei City 106, Taiwan
About.comment-title: We love to here from you...
